auth_notes: Requires a HubSpot Developer Account to create a Private App or a public OAuth app. Scopes must be precisely configured for the specific CRM objects (contacts, deals, companies) being accessed.
rate_limits: 100 requests per 10 seconds for Free/Starter accounts; 150 requests per 10 seconds for Professional/Enterprise. Daily limits range from 250,000 to 1,000,000+ calls.
gotchas: Property Internal Names: You must use the internal API name of a property (e.g., 'firstname') rather than the UI label ('First Name').
Association Logic: Linking records (e.g., a Contact to a Deal) requires specific Association API calls which can be complex in n8n.
Scope Management: If you add a new custom property or object, you often need to update the OAuth scopes and re-authenticate the node.
client_must_provide: OAuth Client ID and Client Secret (if using custom app)
List of custom properties/fields required for the workflow
Super Admin access to approve app installation
research_notes: HubSpot is the primary provider for this category in n8n. While the category mentions GPS, this is typically handled via custom location properties within the CRM or by integrating a secondary GPS-specific node like Geotab alongside the CRM node.

effort_recommendation.rationale: HubSpot is the primary provider for this category in n8n. While the category mentions GPS, this is typically handled via custom location properties within the CRM or by integrating a secondary GPS-specific node like Geotab alongside the CRM node.
